contents.contents:
Inno Setup License
==================

Except where otherwise noted, all of the documentation and software included in the Inno Setup
package is copyrighted by Jordan Russell.

Copyright (C) 1997-2024 Jordan Russell. All rights reserved.
Portions Copyright (C) 2000-2024 Martijn Laan. All rights reserved.

This software is provided "as-is," without any express or implied warranty. In no event shall the
author be held liable for any damages arising from the use of this software.

Permission is granted to anyone to use this software for any purpose, including commercial
applications, and to alter and redistribute it, provided that the following conditions are met:

1. All redistributions of source code files must retain all copyright notices that are currently in
   place, and this list of conditions without modification.

2. All redistributions in binary form must retain all occurrences of the above copyright notice and
   web site addresses that are currently in place (for example, in the About boxes).

3. The origin of this software must not be misrepresented; you must not claim that you wrote the
   original software. If you use this software to distribute a product, an acknowledgment in the
   product documentation would be appreciated but is not required.

4. Modified versions in source or binary form must be plainly marked as such, and must not be
   misrepresented as being the original software.

contents.content: the software is provided "as-is" and without warranty of any kind, either express or implied.
The author shall not be liable for any damage caused by the use of such software.

permissions._str:
Actions:
- Ol Use the obtained source code without modification (Use the fetched code as it is.)
- Ol Using Modified Source Code
- Ol Use the retrieved binaries (Use the fetched binary as it is.)
- Ol Use binaries generated from modified source code

Conditions: None

contents.description: Use the fetched code as it is.
contents.name: Use the obtained source code without modification
Using Modified Source Code

contents.description: Use the fetched binary as it is.
contents.name: Use the retrieved binaries
Use binaries generated from modified source code

permissions._str:
Description: If used in a product, it would be nice to include an acknowledgement in the product documentation, but it is not required.
Actions:
- Ol Distribute the obtained source code without modification (Redistribute the code as it was obtained)

Conditions:
AND
  Ol OBLIGATION: Include the copyright notice contained in the software
  Ol OBLIGATION: Include a list of terms included in the license
  Ol OBLIGATION: Correctly indicate the origin of the software in question

contents.description: Redistribute the code as it was obtained
contents.name: Distribute the obtained source code without modification
Include the copyright notice contained in the software
Include a list of terms included in the license
Correctly indicate the origin of the software in question

permissions.description: If used in a product, it would be nice to include an acknowledgement in the product documentation, but it is not required.

permissions._str:
Description: The copyright notice and website address should appear as it is in the About box or wherever it is currently displayed. Acknowledgement of the product documentation is desirable but not required for use in the product.
Actions:
- Ol Distribute the fetched binaries (Redistribute the fetched binaries as they are)

Conditions:
AND
  Ol OBLIGATION: Include a copyright notice in the license
  Ol OBLIGATION: Include the address of the website that is included in the software
  Ol OBLIGATION: Correctly indicate the origin of the software in question

contents.description: Redistribute the fetched binaries as they are
contents.name: Distribute the fetched binaries
Include a copyright notice in the license
Include the address of the website that is included in the software
Correctly indicate the origin of the software in question

permissions.description: The copyright notice and website address should appear as it is in the About box or wherever it is currently displayed. Acknowledgement of the product documentation is desirable but not required for use in the product.

permissions._str:
Actions:
- Ol Modify the obtained source code.

Conditions:
AND
  Ol OBLIGATION: Correctly indicate the origin of the software in question
  Ol OBLIGATION: Indicate that you have made the change yourself.

contents.name: Modify the obtained source code.
Correctly indicate the origin of the software in question
Indicate that you have made the change yourself.
